overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character traversing a foggy, neon-lit waterfront district during an orange-hazed night. The character transitions from walking through urban streets to running along a coastal promenade lined with palm trees and digital billboards, with wet reflective surfaces and heavy atmospheric pollution effects.

events.description: moving from crosswalk onto main boulevard
turning left at intersection toward palm tree lined street

agents.ego_description: walking through the urban intersection toward the David's building, then turning left onto the main street

notable_agents.action: car driving through the foggy intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: commercial building with large tiger logo and red neon signage reading David's
yellow zebra crossing stripes on wet reflective asphalt
tall traffic signal pole with horizontal arm extending over the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a foggy commercial intersection with the David's building prominently visible ahead. The character walks across the yellow crosswalk stripes and turns left onto a street lined with palm trees, passing a traffic light pole while a car drives through the hazy distance.

events.description: leaving dense commercial buildings, approaching waterfront promenade
palm trees become more prominent as the waterfront opens up to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the boulevard past large digital billboards and palm trees, approaching the waterfront area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the waterfront

entered.detail: large digital billboard with purple neon text and portrait advertisement
tall palm trees lining the street and swaying in the wind
neon sign with blue and orange text reading CALIENTE

segments.scene_description: Walking along the coastal boulevard, the character passes the large Feel the Chemistry billboard and Caliente neon sign. Palm trees line the left side of the street as the environment opens up toward the waterfront, with the traffic light pole receding into the background.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the promenade
moving from open promenade to curved path with advertisement walls

agents.ego_description: running along the waterfront promenade past other pedestrians, with palm trees swaying heavily in the wind

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking toward the camera along the promenade
person standing near the railing looking out at the foggy water

entered.detail: low concrete wall with red trim separating promenade from the water
modern Y-shaped street lamps along the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run along the wet tiled promenade, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Palm trees sway dramatically in the wind along the right side while the waterfront railing separates the path from the foggy ocean. The environment transitions from the open boulevard to a more defined curved path.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway with advertisement walls

events.description: passing sequential illuminated wall advertisements along the curved path
slight deceleration while navigating the curved promenade path

agents.ego_description: running along the curved waterfront path passing illuminated wall advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the railing looking at a device or taking a photo

entered.detail: large digital advertisement with purple text reading WET DREAM
advertisement with red background and portrait for Vargas with health warning text
white advertisement with classical imagery and Giovanni Bricci text

segments.scene_description: Running along the curved waterfront walkway, the character passes a series of large illuminated wall advertisements including Wet Dream and Vargas billboards. The path curves to the right with the Giovanni Bricci advertisement visible ahead, while palm trees fade into the foggy distance on the left. A person leans against the railing taking photos as the character continues along the wet reflective tiles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy commercial intersection into a neon-lit coastal promenade. It begins with the character crossing yellow stripes toward David's building before turning left onto a street where palm trees and a distant car emerge through the haze. As the character walks along the boulevard, the scene opens up toward the waterfront, passing the large Feel the Chemistry billboard and Caliente neon sign. The pace then accelerates into a run along a wet tiled promenade, where the environment shifts from an open street to a curved path lined with swaying palm trees and a railing overlooking the foggy ocean. Finally, the camera glides past a series of illuminated advertisements, including Wet Dream and Giovanni Bricci, while passing a photographer leaning against the railing under the orange-hazed night sky.
